page_0423.png: Screenshot of the aaHistClientQuery control showing a Historian Client Query interface with Tag Picker panel (LOCALHOST server with TT_001.PV selected), time range selection (October 12, 2007), and historical data results grid with 100 rows of temperature readings
page_0424.png: Screenshot of the aaHistClientTagPicker control showing a Tag Picker dialog with LOCALHOST server tree (Public Groups, Private Groups), tag list with columns for Tag Name (Agitator_001.PV through LIT_002.PV), Description, and I/O Address, plus filter tabs for All, Analog, Discrete, String, and Event
page_0425_0.png: Screenshot of the aaHistClientTimeRangePicker control showing start and end date-time fields (October 12, 2007) with a calendar popup for October 2007 highlighting the 12th, and a time offset field showing 00:00:00
page_0425_1.png: Screenshot of the aaHistClientTimeRangePicker control showing a dropdown menu with preset time duration options (1 minute through 4 hours) with 30 minutes currently highlighted, and start/end timestamp fields showing a 5-minute span
page_0426.png: Screenshot of the aaHistClientActiveDataGrid control showing a historical data grid with SysTimeSec tag entries, columns for DateTime, TagName, Value, and vValue, displaying a per-second counter that rolls over from 59 to 0 at minute boundaries
page_0427.png: Screenshot of the aaHistClientSingleValueEntry control showing a Select tag dialog with LOCALHOST server highlighted, tag list showing Agitator speed and Inlet tags with Tag Name, Description, and I/O Address columns, and filter/search options at the bottom
page_0429.png: Screenshot of the aaTrendControl embedded in InTouch HMI showing a historical trend display with Tag Picker panel (S01ENG server, Level_001.PV through Level_008.PV tags), time range controls for a 5-minute window, and a trend chart with annotated data points
page_0430.png: Screenshot of the InTouch HMI Graphic Editor showing an empty aaTrendControl component placed on the canvas with Tag Picker panel (empty Servers and Tags sections), time range controls, and the Toolbox search panel showing aaTrendControl as the matching component
